description: Single-day time grid view with configurable slot duration, resource grouping, drag-and-drop, and resize support. Delegates rendering to TmSchedulerTimeGrid.

examples.title: Day view with resource columns
examples.code: <TmSchedulerDayView CurrentDate="DateTime.Today" Events="@_events" Resources="@_rooms" SlotDuration="30" OnSlotClick="@HandleSlotClick" OnEventClick="@HandleEventClick" />
